name: Zamage Digital Art Imaging, Inc.
summary: Zamage Digital Art Imaging, Inc., through its subsidiaries, offers indoor/outdoor signage and software solutions. It develops Parasign Systems that allows clients to create their own signage online. The company offers software solutions and professional service for various industries, including banking, education, manufacturing, etc. Zamage Digital Art Imaging, Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in Henderson, Nevada.
